description: The Clan Ascione is a Camorra organization originating and operating in the Ercolano area of Italy. It emerged in the 1980s, defeating the Esposito clan in a local feud. The clan is involved in racketeering and other criminal activities. Its current status is unclear from the text.

country_links.evidence_quote: Nel febbraio 2013 viene arrestato a Bogotà il latitante Tommaso Iacomino...
country_links.context: A fugitive member of the clan was arrested in Bogotá.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 12 dicembre 1990 dopo due anni di latitanza trascorsi in Germania
country_links.context: Raffaele Ascione, a leader of the clan, hid in Germany while a fugitive.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 14 novembre 2007 viene arrestato in Spagna , nei pressi di Gerona , il latitante Natale Suarino.
country_links.context: A fugitive member of the clan was arrested in Spain.
